user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast — Scrambled Eggs, Turkey Bacon & Pancakes
fields.short_description: A hearty, familiar American-style breakfast with fluffy whole-grain pancakes, scrambled eggs, and crisp turkey bacon — comforting, protein-forward, and kid-friendly.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk eggs with a splash of milk, salt, and pepper; scramble gently in a nonstick pan until just set. Cook turkey bacon until crisp. Prepare whole-grain pancake batter, cook on a hot griddle until golden, and keep warm. Serve two small pancakes with a light drizzle of maple syrup, scrambled eggs on the side, and turkey bacon strips. Add a side of fresh fruit (berries or orange slices) for brightness.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides balanced protein from eggs and turkey bacon, complex carbohydrates and fiber from whole-grain pancakes, and vitamins from fresh fruit. Using turkey bacon and whole-grain pancakes reduces saturated fat and increases fiber compared with traditional versions; portion control on syrup limits added sugar.

insertion_point.reasoning: Append (position -1) to Father's Day 1 breakfast to add a classic American option that contrasts with the existing Greek/Mediterranean choices, offering variety while keeping a protein-rich, balanced morning meal.
